cute: adjective. Possessing physical features, behaviors, personality traits or other properties that are mainly attributed to infants and small

teth: noun. The ninth letter of many Semitic alphabets/abjads (Phoenician, Aramaic, Hebrew, Syriac, Arabic and others).
the: article. Used before a noun phrase, including a simple noun The definite grammatical article that shows that the noun phrase that
thus: adverb. In this way or manner.
